claims.summary: Mode packing and structural plurality describe felt texture more faithfully than one pressure scalar.
claims.disposition: verify the typed resonance-density components and texture signature projection

claims.summary: Observation and active damping need an explicit authority distinction.
claims.disposition: verify observational readout, intervention type, and typed dispatch authority boundaries

claims.summary: Texture, gradients, flux, and tail structure should be typed rather than stored only in a free-form note.
claims.disposition: verify ResonanceTextureSignatureV1, BridgeTextureEvidenceV1, gradient, flux, and constraint fields

claims.summary: Active damping may flatten lambda-four-plus vibrancy if treated as an isolated linear dial.
claims.disposition: require scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval, replay, abort bounds, and post-change felt review before any damping change

claims.summary: Manual override and 0.01 damping sweeps would directly alter live spectral regulation.
claims.disposition: keep both experiments behind Tier 5 live-substrate approval; use evidence-only fixtures meanwhile
